video_results.title: AI Trends 2026: Quantum, Agentic AI & Smarter Automation
Combination of AI and automation is very powerful, says UiPath CEO Daniel Dines
How artificial intelligence is changing Amazon’s workforce

llm_synthesis: Factual Summary: The latest AI and automation news includes trends such as quantum AI, agentic AI, and smarter automation. Industry leaders like UiPath CEO Daniel Dines highlight the powerful combination of AI and automation. Additionally, companies like Amazon are leveraging artificial intelligence to transform their workforce. | Integrity Check: Pass
